name: stagecraft
description: Stagecraft: the governed agentic delivery control plane, stamped as an EnRaHiTu app (spec 002). Encore.ts services on the slimmed enrahitu chassis (@enrahitu/toolchain + @enrahitu/hiqlite-native), plus the governance spine addon (spec 008).

scripts.build:addon: npm --prefix addon/governance-native install && npm --prefix addon/governance-native run build && npm --prefix addon/fleet-native install && npm --prefix addon/fleet-native run build
scripts.dev:idp: docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml up -d && node scripts/sync-dev-rauthy-secret.mjs
